name: Comanche County
description_short: Comanche County Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering savings accounts, checking, auto loans, mortgages, and share certificates with competitive rates.
description_long:
Comanche County Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving the Comanche County area. As a federally chartered credit union, it is NCUA-insured and provides traditional banking services with a focus on personalized member benefits rather than shareholder profits.

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including savings accounts, checking accounts, share certificates, consumer loans, auto financing, recreational vehicle loans, boat loans, mortgages, and VISA credit cards. They actively promote competitive lending rates, with advertised APRs as low as 4.69% for new automobiles, 5.73% for new boats, and 5.74% for recreational vehicles as of July 2025. Members can access mobile deposit functionality, wire transfers, eStatements, and financial calculators through their digital platforms.

Comanche County FCU distinguishes itself through member-focused services including extended auto financing (84 months on 2019+ vehicles), mobile banking apps for iOS and Android, and an emphasis on eliminating lengthy in-person banking through mobile deposit technology. Their mortgage programs are positioned as "competitive home mortgage options" to help members achieve homeownership, and they maintain a transparent fee schedule and rate information on their website.

As a credit union, this institution is best suited for individuals seeking member-owned banking with competitive rates and personalized service. The main limitation is that membership eligibility typically requires living, working, or having family connections in the Comanche County area, restricting access compared to national banks. Rate competitiveness and specific membership requirements should be verified directly with the institution.
services: Auto loans with up to 84-month financing
pros: Offers 84-month auto financing on 2019 and newer vehicles, providing extended repayment flexibility
Advertised competitive APRs: 4.69% for new auto, 5.73% for new boats, 5.74% for RVs (as of 07/18/2025)
Mobile deposit feature allows check deposits via photograph anytime, anywhere without visiting a branch
Free mobile apps available for both iOS and Android for banking on-the-go
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means profits return to members rather than external shareholders
NCUA-insured deposits providing federal protection for member funds
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, share certificates, and consumer loans
cons: Membership eligibility likely restricted to Comanche County area residents or employees, limiting accessibility compared to national banks
No specific mention of branch locations or hours on homepage, requiring members to contact for service details
Limited transparency on mortgage rates and terms on the homepage; requires contacting institution directly
No indication of early repayment penalties or loan origination fees in advertised rates and terms
Website does not display current savings account APYs or checking account features, making rate comparison difficult
best_for: Comanche County residents and employees seeking member-owned banking with competitive auto and mortgage rates
Borrowers looking for extended auto financing terms (84 months) on newer vehicles
Individuals wanting mobile banking convenience combined with personalized credit union service
diagnosis: Comanche County FCU is ideal for members in or near Comanche County seeking competitive rates on auto financing, mortgages, and traditional banking products through a not-for-profit, member-owned institution. The primary caveat is membership eligibility—this credit union likely requires geographic or employment affiliation with Comanche County, making it inaccessible to consumers outside that service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Comanche County — Credit Union in Lawton, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Comanche County — NCUA-insured credit union in Lawton, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
